title: Fluffy Syrian Herb Stir-fry
description: A kid-friendly and paleo-friendly Syrian herb stir-fry featuring sweet red peppers, almonds, and other herbs for a savory and nutritious meal.
instructions: Heat a tablespoon of coconut oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add sweet red peppers, sliced into strips, and cook until they start to soften. Stir occasionally for about 5 minutes.
Add minced garlic and sauté for another minute until fragrant.
Stir in ground flaxseed, turmeric, and thyme. Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes or until the mixture forms a slightly thick consistency.
Add almonds to the pan, stirring them gently with the peppers and green onions. Season with salt and pepper according to taste.
Reduce heat to low, allow it to simmer for about 5 minutes more to meld all flavors together.
Serve warm over rice or as a side dish.
